homepage.heroSubline: Delivering reliable electrical solutions across San Diego County. Licensed, insured, and ready to tackle any project.
homepage.aboutTitle: Powering San Diego Homes and Businesses Since 2012
aboutText: Electrical Experts Of San Diego started with a simple mission: to provide honest, reliable electrical services to our neighbors. We saw a need for electricians who prioritized quality workmanship and clear communication, and we've built our reputation on exceeding those expectations.

Our approach is straightforward: diagnose the problem accurately, explain the solution clearly, and execute the work flawlessly. We believe in doing the job right the first time, using only the highest quality materials and adhering to all safety standards. We strive to ensure every project meets and exceeds California electrical codes.

As a local San Diego business, we're committed to giving back to the community that supports us. We actively participate in local initiatives and prioritize hiring local talent. We understand the unique electrical needs of San Diego homes and businesses, from coastal corrosion to wildfire safety.

valueProps.title: 24/7 Emergency Service
valueProps.description: Electrical emergencies don't wait, and neither do we. We're available around the clock to handle urgent electrical issues.

valueProps.title: Upfront Pricing
valueProps.description: No hidden fees or surprises. We provide clear, detailed estimates before any work begins.

valueProps.title: Experienced Technicians
valueProps.description: Our team consists of highly trained and licensed electricians with years of experience in San Diego County.

valueProps.title: Guaranteed Workmanship
valueProps.description: We stand behind our work with a solid guarantee. If you're not satisfied, we'll make it right.

services.name: Electrical Panel Upgrades
services.shortDescription: Ensure your home's electrical system can handle modern power demands.
services.description:
Is your electrical panel outdated, overloaded, or showing signs of wear? Electrical Experts Of San Diego specializes in electrical panel upgrades and replacements. Many older San Diego homes, especially those in areas like North Park and Hillcrest, have panels that are no longer adequate for today's energy consumption. We'll assess your current electrical load, recommend the appropriate panel size, and install it safely and efficiently. 

Upgrading your electrical panel can prevent dangerous overloads, flickering lights, and potential fire hazards. It also allows you to add new appliances, electric vehicle chargers, or solar panels without stressing your electrical system. Our team is well-versed in all local codes and regulations, ensuring your upgrade meets the highest safety standards. We handle everything from permits to inspections, making the process seamless and stress-free for you. We use quality panels designed to withstand San Diego's climate, including the coastal salt air corrosion.
process: Step 1: Thorough assessment of your current electrical panel and energy needs.
Step 2: Recommendation of the appropriate panel size and type.
Step 3: Secure necessary permits and schedule installation.
Step 4: Safe and efficient installation of the new electrical panel, followed by a comprehensive inspection.
benefits: Prevention of overloads and fire hazards
Support for new appliances and technologies

faq.question: How do I know if I need an electrical panel upgrade?
faq.answer: Common signs include flickering lights, tripped breakers, outdated panel, and the inability to add new electrical loads. If you're experiencing any of these issues, it's time to call Electrical Experts Of San Diego.

faq.question: How long does an electrical panel upgrade take?
faq.answer: Typically, an electrical panel upgrade can be completed in one day. However, it depends on the complexity of the installation and any unforeseen issues that may arise.

faq.question: Do I need a permit for an electrical panel upgrade?
faq.answer: Yes, a permit is required for electrical panel upgrades in San Diego. We handle all the permitting process for you, ensuring compliance with local regulations.

services.name: Lighting Installation
services.shortDescription: Enhance your home's ambiance and energy efficiency with expert lighting solutions.
services.description:
From recessed lighting and chandeliers to outdoor landscape lighting, Electrical Experts Of San Diego provides comprehensive lighting installation services. We understand the importance of proper lighting for both aesthetics and functionality. Whether you're renovating your home in La Jolla or building a new office space in the Gaslamp Quarter, we can design and install a lighting system that meets your specific needs. 

We specialize in energy-efficient LED lighting solutions that can save you money on your electricity bills while reducing your carbon footprint. Our team is experienced in installing a wide range of lighting fixtures, ensuring proper wiring and safe operation. We also offer smart lighting solutions that allow you to control your lights remotely and create custom lighting scenes. Considering the intense San Diego sun, proper indoor lighting is crucial for comfort and style.
process: Step 1: Consultation to discuss your lighting needs and preferences.
Step 2: Design of a custom lighting plan that maximizes energy efficiency and aesthetics.
Step 3: Professional installation of all lighting fixtures and wiring.
Step 4: Testing and inspection to ensure proper operation and safety.
benefits: Increased energy efficiency and cost savings

faq.question: What are the benefits of LED lighting?
faq.answer: LED lighting is more energy-efficient, longer-lasting, and produces less heat than traditional lighting options. They also offer a wider range of color temperatures and dimming capabilities.

faq.question: Can you install outdoor lighting?
faq.answer: Yes, we specialize in outdoor lighting installation, including landscape lighting, security lighting, and patio lighting. We use weather-resistant fixtures built to withstand San Diego's coastal climate.

faq.question: Do you offer smart lighting solutions?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer a variety of smart lighting solutions that allow you to control your lights remotely, set schedules, and create custom lighting scenes.

services.name: Outlet and Switch Repair
services.shortDescription: Solve your outlet and switch problems with reliable repair services.
services.description:
Faulty outlets and switches can be a nuisance and a safety hazard. Electrical Experts Of San Diego provides prompt and reliable outlet and switch repair services throughout San Diego County. Whether you have a loose outlet, a malfunctioning switch, or a broken GFCI outlet, our team can diagnose the problem and provide an effective solution.

We understand the importance of safety when it comes to electrical repairs. Our electricians are trained to identify potential hazards and ensure all repairs are done to code. We use quality materials and follow industry best practices to ensure long-lasting results. Don't ignore those sparking outlets in your 1940s cottage near the beach – call us for a quick and safe fix.
process: Step 1: Diagnostic testing to identify the cause of the problem.
Step 2: Repair or replacement of faulty outlets and switches.
Step 3: Inspection to ensure proper operation and safety.
Step 4: Clean up of the work area.

faq.question: Why is my outlet not working?
faq.answer: There could be several reasons for a non-working outlet, including a tripped breaker, a loose connection, or a faulty outlet. Our electricians can quickly diagnose the cause and provide a solution.

faq.question: What is a GFCI outlet?
faq.answer: A GFCI (Ground Fault Circuit Interrupter) outlet is designed to protect against electrical shock in wet areas, such as bathrooms and kitchens. It's important to have these outlets installed and functioning properly.

faq.question: How often should I replace my outlets and switches?
faq.answer: Outlets and switches should be replaced if they are damaged, loose, or malfunctioning. It's also a good idea to replace them every 15-20 years to ensure optimal safety and performance.

services.name: Wiring Services
services.shortDescription: Comprehensive wiring solutions for new construction, remodels, and repairs.
services.description:
Electrical Experts Of San Diego offers a full range of wiring services for residential and commercial properties. Whether you're building a new home in Scripps Ranch, remodeling your kitchen in Pacific Beach, or need to rewire an older building in the Gaslamp Quarter, our team has the expertise to handle any wiring project.

We use quality wiring materials and follow all safety codes to ensure your electrical system is safe and reliable. We offer a variety of wiring services, including new wiring installation, rewiring, and electrical panel upgrades. We understand that properties near the coast require special wiring precautions due to salt air corrosion.
process: Step 1: Assessment of your wiring needs and project requirements.
Step 2: Design of a safe and efficient wiring plan.
Step 3: Professional installation of all wiring and components.
Step 4: Testing and inspection to ensure proper operation and safety.

faq.question: What is the difference between aluminum and copper wiring?
faq.answer: Copper wiring is the standard for modern electrical systems due to its superior conductivity and safety. Aluminum wiring was used in some older homes but can be a fire hazard if not properly maintained.

faq.question: How do I know if my home needs rewiring?
faq.answer: Common signs include flickering lights, frequent breaker trips, and burning smells coming from outlets or switches. If you notice any of these signs, it's important to have your wiring inspected by a qualified electrician.

faq.question: Do you offer electrical inspections?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer comprehensive electrical inspections to identify potential hazards and ensure your electrical system is safe and up to code.

services.name: Emergency Electrical Services
services.shortDescription: 24/7 emergency electrical services to handle urgent electrical issues.
services.description:
Electrical emergencies can happen at any time. Electrical Experts Of San Diego offers 24/7 emergency electrical services to handle urgent electrical issues throughout San Diego County. Whether you have a power outage, a downed power line, or a sparking electrical panel, our team is ready to respond quickly and safely.

We understand the stress and inconvenience that electrical emergencies can cause. Our experienced electricians are equipped to diagnose and repair a wide range of electrical problems, minimizing downtime and preventing further damage. We prioritize safety and take all necessary precautions to protect your home and family. San Diego's wildfire season highlights the importance of quick responses to electrical emergencies.
process: Step 1: Immediate response to your emergency call.
Step 2: Rapid diagnosis of the electrical problem.
Step 3: Safe and efficient repair of the issue.
Step 4: Thorough inspection to ensure the problem is resolved.

faq.question: What constitutes an electrical emergency?
faq.answer: Electrical emergencies include power outages, downed power lines, sparking electrical panels, and any situation that poses an immediate threat to safety.

faq.question: How quickly can you respond to an emergency?
faq.answer: We strive to respond to emergency calls as quickly as possible, typically within an hour, depending on your location and the severity of the situation.

faq.question: What should I do while waiting for an electrician to arrive?
faq.answer: Stay away from any downed power lines or exposed wires. If there is a fire, evacuate the building and call 911. Turn off the main breaker if it is safe to do so.

services.name: EV Charger Installation
services.shortDescription: Expert installation of electric vehicle (EV) chargers for homes and businesses.
services.description:
As electric vehicles become more popular, Electrical Experts Of San Diego is here to help you install a convenient and reliable EV charger at your home or business. We offer a full range of EV charger installation services, from basic Level 2 chargers to high-speed DC fast chargers.

We'll assess your electrical capacity, recommend the appropriate charger for your vehicle and needs, and install it safely and efficiently. We handle all the necessary permits and inspections, making the process seamless for you. With the increasing popularity of EVs in San Diego, ensure your home is ready for the future of transportation.
process: Step 1: Assessment of your electrical capacity and EV charging needs.
Step 2: Recommendation of the appropriate EV charger.
Step 3: Secure necessary permits and schedule installation.
Step 4: Safe and efficient installation of the EV charger, followed by a comprehensive inspection.
benefits: Convenient and reliable EV charging at home or business

faq.question: What is a Level 2 EV charger?
faq.answer: A Level 2 EV charger uses a 240-volt outlet and can charge your electric vehicle much faster than a standard 120-volt outlet.

faq.question: How much does it cost to install an EV charger?
faq.answer: The cost of EV charger installation varies depending on the complexity of the installation, the type of charger, and any necessary electrical upgrades. We provide free estimates to help you determine the cost.

faq.question: Are there any rebates or incentives for EV charger installation?
faq.answer: Yes, there may be rebates or incentives available from the state of California or your local utility company. We can help you identify and apply for any applicable incentives.

services.name: Commercial Electrical Services
services.shortDescription: Reliable electrical solutions for businesses throughout San Diego County.
services.description:
Electrical Experts Of San Diego provides comprehensive commercial electrical services to businesses of all sizes. Whether you need electrical repairs, new wiring installation, or energy-efficient lighting upgrades, our team has the expertise to handle any commercial electrical project.

We understand the importance of minimizing downtime and ensuring the safety of your employees and customers. Our experienced electricians are equipped to diagnose and repair electrical problems quickly and efficiently. We also offer preventative maintenance services to help you avoid costly repairs and keep your electrical system running smoothly. From the Gaslamp Quarter to Sorrento Valley, we service businesses across San Diego’s diverse commercial landscape.
process: Step 1: Consultation to discuss your commercial electrical needs.
Step 2: Development of a customized electrical plan.
Step 3: Professional installation and repair services.
Step 4: Ongoing maintenance and support.

faq.question: Do you offer electrical inspections for commercial properties?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer comprehensive electrical inspections to identify potential hazards and ensure your electrical system is safe and up to code.

faq.question: Can you help me reduce my energy costs?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer a variety of energy-efficient lighting and electrical solutions that can help you reduce your energy costs and improve your bottom line.

faq.question: Do you offer emergency electrical services for commercial properties?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer 24/7 emergency electrical services to handle urgent electrical issues at your commercial property.

reviews.name: Maria G.
reviews.text: Electrical Experts Of San Diego did an amazing job upgrading our electrical panel. Our old panel was outdated and couldn't handle our new appliances. The team was professional, efficient, and explained everything clearly. We highly recommend them!

reviews.name: David S.
reviews.text: We hired Electrical Experts Of San Diego to install recessed lighting in our living room. They did a great job, and the new lighting looks fantastic. There was a small delay due to a part shortage, but they communicated well and kept us informed throughout the process.

reviews.name: Jessica L.
reviews.text: I had a few outlets that weren't working, and Electrical Experts Of San Diego fixed them quickly and efficiently. The electrician was friendly and knowledgeable, and the price was very reasonable. I will definitely use them again in the future.

reviews.name: Robert K.
reviews.text: The team at Electrical Experts Of San Diego installed my EV charger perfectly. They were very helpful in choosing the right charger for my car and made the whole process easy. I'm very happy with their service!

reviews.name: Susan M.
reviews.text: We had a power outage in the middle of the night, and Electrical Experts Of San Diego responded quickly and restored our power within an hour. They were professional, courteous, and a lifesaver!

reviews.name: Michael B.
reviews.text: Electrical Experts Of San Diego rewired our kitchen during a remodel. The work was done well and to code. We had one minor issue after the inspection, but they came back and fixed it promptly. Overall, a good experience.
